message: Wireless Earbuds Pro has zero inventory but your Google Ads campaign is spending $420 per day targeting this product. You're paying for clicks that lead to dead ends.
detail: Product SKU-WEP-BLK currently shows 0 units available across all locations. Your active 'Audio Essentials' campaign has a daily budget of $420 targeting this product. Estimated revenue loss from stockout: $1,840 over the next 4 days based on current conversion rate.

recommendedActions.action: Pause 'Audio Essentials' campaign until restock is confirmed
Create an urgent restock purchase order for Wireless Earbuds Pro
recommendedActions.estimatedImpact: Recover $1,840 in lost revenue within 4 days

message: Your Organic Cotton T-Shirt is your best-converting product this week at 8.2% conversion rate, but your ad budget is 60% allocated to lower-performing SKUs.
detail: Product 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt (SKU-OCT-NAT)' achieved 8.2% conversion rate vs. 2.1% portfolio average. Current ad budget allocation: 12% ($84/day). Recommended allocation based on ROAS: 35% ($245/day). 312 units in stock — sufficient runway for increased demand.

recommendedActions.action: Increase 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' campaign budget from $84 to $245 per day
recommendedActions.estimatedImpact: Projected $3,200 additional revenue over next 7 days

recommendedActions.action: Reduce budget on 'Bundle Deal' campaign — ROAS below 1.2x threshold

message: Running Shoes (Size 10) will stock out in approximately 6 days at current sell-through rate, but your lead time from the supplier is 14 days.
detail: Current inventory for SKU-RS-SZ10: 47 units. Average daily sell-through rate (last 14 days): 7.8 units/day. Projected stockout: March 10, 2026. Supplier lead time: 14 days. Recommended reorder quantity based on demand forecast: 120 units.

recommendedActions.action: Submit purchase order for 120 units of Running Shoes Size 10 TODAY
recommendedActions.estimatedImpact: Prevent $5,640 in lost revenue from 8-day stockout gap

recommendedActions.action: Enable 'Pre-Order' mode on product listing to capture demand during restock
recommendedActions.estimatedImpact: Retain 30-40% of demand during stockout period

message: Your ad cost per unit sold has increased 34% this month while your average selling price held flat — your net margin on the Electronics category is being squeezed.
detail: Electronics category: Average CPA rose from $8.20 to $11.00 (+34%). Average order value held at $67.40. Net margin compression: 3.9 percentage points. Primary driver: click cost inflation in 'Smart Home' and 'Audio' subcategories.

recommendedActions.action: Switch Electronics campaigns to Target ROAS bidding (set ROAS goal: 4.5x)
recommendedActions.estimatedImpact: Stabilize margin within 2 weeks — estimated $890/month recovery

recommendedActions.action: Review and exclude low-performing search terms driving up CPA
